findings.problem: Build/check/desktopTest fail because a scoped include message rule hides unrelated tags. The failing test is FilterBehaviorTest.scopedIncludeMessageRuleNarrowsOnlyMatchingTag at FilterBehaviorTest.kt:44.
findings.whyItMatters: The repository cannot pass the requested verification commands, and the behavior is likely user-visible when users add scoped include rules from the context menu.
findings.suggestedFix: Codify scoped include-rule semantics. Based on the existing test, apply a scoped include rule only within its scope and let entries outside that scope fall back to the normal filter behavior.
findings.suggestedTest: Keep the existing failing test and add package-prefix scoped include/exclude combinations.

findings.problem: Each openFile call launches an IO coroutine that mutates tabs, activeTabId, and isLoading. Concurrent loads perform non-atomic tabs = tabs + t updates and share one loading boolean.
findings.whyItMatters: Dropping/opening multiple files can lose tabs, activate an unexpected tab, or hide loading while other files are still parsing.
findings.suggestedFix: Serialize file-load completion through one state owner or a mutex/reducer, and track pending loads with a count or set instead of one boolean.
findings.suggestedTest: Use a fake delayed loader to open multiple files concurrently and assert all tabs are retained and loading stays true until the final completion.

findings.problem: AppState owns UI state, parsing orchestration, file dialogs, clipboard, autosave, note export, saved-filter import/export, and serialization.
findings.whyItMatters: Unclear ownership makes behavior brittle and hard to test with fake services.
findings.suggestedFix: Extract injected collaborators for log loading, autosave, saved filters, notes, dialogs, and clipboard.
findings.suggestedTest: Add state-transition tests using fake stores/loaders without real FileDialog, clipboard, or user-home paths.

findings.problem: Filtering, sequence computation, suggestion building, and regex matching are run synchronously during composition or UI state updates.
findings.whyItMatters: Large logs or regex-heavy filters can block the UI thread and cause jank/freezes.
findings.suggestedFix: Move expensive work to a debounced background pipeline and cache/precompile regexes per filter/rule/sequence.
findings.suggestedTest: Add large synthetic log performance/regression tests for filtering and sequence computation.

findings.problem: Lines longer than 8192 characters are silently skipped before RAW fallback handling.
findings.whyItMatters: Long JSON payloads, stack frames, or encoded values can disappear from the viewer.
findings.suggestedFix: Preserve long lines as RAW entries, optionally truncated with a visible marker and original length.
findings.suggestedTest: Parse a file with a non-empty line longer than 8192 characters and assert a RAW entry remains.

findings.area: Desktop portability and app data locations
findings.problem: Autosave and note files are stored under hardcoded ~/.openlog2 paths.
findings.whyItMatters: This ignores Windows, macOS, and Linux app-data conventions and complicates cleanup/backup expectations.
findings.suggestedFix: Introduce an app-directories provider for OS-specific config/cache/data paths and inject it.
findings.suggestedTest: Unit-test path selection across fake platform inputs.

findings.problem: Autosave and note auto-export persist recent file paths, source paths, filters, and log-derived annotations without an in-app retention/privacy control.
findings.whyItMatters: Logs often contain sensitive data, and users may not expect excerpts and absolute paths to remain in local app files after closing the app.
findings.suggestedFix: Add controls to disable autosave/auto-export, clear recent history/cache, and document local retention.
findings.suggestedTest: Verify disabling persistence prevents writes and clearing history removes paths from serialized state.

findings.problem: Saved-filter JSON is hand-built and parsed with regex/comma splitting, which breaks on commas, quotes, escapes, newlines, and control characters.
findings.whyItMatters: Saved analysis filters can be corrupted or lost during export/import.
findings.suggestedFix: Use kotlinx.serialization or a real JSON parser, or export the existing token format without labeling it general JSON.
findings.suggestedTest: Round-trip filters containing commas, quotes, backslashes, newlines, regex metacharacters, message rules, and sequences.

findings.problem: Post-dialog file reads/writes run synchronously from UI callbacks.
findings.whyItMatters: Large files or slow folders can freeze the UI thread.
findings.suggestedFix: Move file IO to an IO coroutine and publish completion/error state back to the UI.
findings.suggestedTest: Inject a suspending fake file store and assert loading/error state without blocking the caller.

findings.problem: The internal IO CoroutineScope has no cancellation/disposal path.
findings.whyItMatters: Future window recreation, tests, or multi-window support can leave background work running against stale state.
findings.suggestedFix: Make AppState closeable or inject an externally owned scope and cancel it from Compose lifecycle.
findings.suggestedTest: Inject a test scope, dispose state, and assert pending jobs are cancelled.

findings.problem: Some FileDialog directory/file values are joined with File(dir + path) instead of File(dir, path).
findings.whyItMatters: String path joining is fragile across platforms and relies on FileDialog returning a trailing separator.
findings.suggestedTest: Add a helper test for joining directory/file values with and without trailing separators.

findings.problem: Native packaging is configured, but signing/notarization/vendor/license/upgrade readiness is not configured or documented.
findings.whyItMatters: Public release on macOS/Windows/Linux can hit trust prompts, installer metadata gaps, or upgrade uncertainty.
findings.suggestedFix: Add release metadata, document per-OS release commands, configure signing/notarization for public distribution, and test installer upgrade behavior.
findings.suggestedTest: Run current-OS package smoke tests and maintain an OS-specific release checklist.

findings.problem: FilterPanel and LogViewer callback wiring is duplicated between file and compare views.
findings.whyItMatters: Future UI actions can be added to one mode and missed in the other.
findings.suggestedFix: Extract shared binding adapters for FilterPanel and LogViewer.
findings.suggestedTest: Add regression coverage for shared filter actions in compare mode.

findings.problem: Tests cover many domain/state helpers but not concurrent file opens, IO-scope cancellation, large-file parsing, special-character serialization, OS-specific app-data path selection, or privacy/clear-history behavior.
findings.whyItMatters: The highest-risk desktop boundaries are the least covered.
findings.suggestedFix: Add fake service boundaries and deterministic tests around file/lifecycle/persistence behavior.
findings.suggestedTest: Prioritize tests for OL2-001, OL2-002, OL2-008, and OL2-007.
